nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='Sable swims the drowned moat, current dragging at her rebreather, and the tide-gate arch looms'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=68 beats='Sable forces the old sluice channel, silt clouding her lamp, and comes up under the tide-gate arch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='Sable climbs the rival expedition rotted scaffold and drops down beside the tide-gate arch'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the seaward culvert pulls Sable into a dead cistern with no air pocket, and she must surface, the dive aborted before it begins'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=92 beats='codename Sable reaches the black water over the sunken royal court at slack tide, the rival expedition lights already burning on the far reef; three ways lead down to the tide-gate, the drowned moat, the old sluice, and the rival rotted scaffold, and one seaward culvert that looks quick and wrong'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the counterweight shears and the gate slams, pinning Sable gear until she cuts free and retreats to open water, empty-handed'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the air burst collapses the soft arch and a slow ceiling-fall seals the passage behind her; Sable is forced back out to the sea'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=84 beats='the tide-gate hangs half-shut, its old wards humming faint in the dark water; the winch chain, a flooded gallery mouth, and a maintenance crawl all lead inward'>>

choices.label: Blast the silt with a burst of air.
Ease through the flooded gallery mouth.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=78 beats='beyond the gate a submerged gallery opens, statues of drowned kings staring up through the green; two archways and a stair descend toward the throne level'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the left archway threads past a toppled colonnade, and the throne gallery glimmers ahead'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the side door gives onto a flooded stair that drops without end into cold black; Sable loses her line and must claw back to the gallery, shaken and turned around, the dive lost'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the right archway bends past a caved refectory, a shortcut sign in old court script pointing down'>>

choices.label: Pry the barnacled reliquary door here.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='the grand stair spirals down through silt into the throne level, and the great gallery opens below'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the mosaic floor gives way over a void and Sable barely kicks clear, but her lamp and spare line are gone; blind, she retreats to the gallery mouth'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the sarcophagus lids are trapped with old counterweights that drop a portcullis; Sable is walled off from the circlet and must turn back'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=86 beats='the throne gallery yawns wide, the great chair drowned to its arms, and above it the circlet of the last queen catches Sable lamp; a rival glow-stick already burns near the throne dais'>>
<<FILL role=climax words=88 beats='at the dais the rival diver reaches for the circlet too; Sable can race, feint, or cut the rival tether and force a standoff'>>

choices.label: Race the rival for the circlet.
Feint low and take the high approach.
The rival calls a false truce at the dais.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the rival is faster and snatches the circlet; Sable is outpaced at the first prize and forced to fall back to the gallery with nothing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the feint works, the rival lunges wide, and Sable slips onto the dais with the circlet in reach'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='the cut tether sends the rival tumbling in the current; Sable can grab the circlet now or secure the rival gear first'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='stripping the rival costs seconds; a surge slams the gallery and the circlet slides into a flooded fissure, gone beyond reach, and Sable retreats'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the drowned circlet is Sable first regalia piece, cold and heavier than it looks; the gallery exit leads on toward the reliquary halls'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='Sable pauses too long and the rising tide floods the only exit; she is cut off and must blow her reserve to surface, the run over with a single piece'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='past the throne the water darkens; a colonnade march and a servant crawl both bend toward the reliquary'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the ward-lattice flares and a boom of pressure ruptures Sable ears; disoriented, she loses the reliquary and gropes back the way she came'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the oubliette narrows to nothing and Sable wedges, freeing herself only by shedding her sample bag and the circlet lead; she surfaces to regroup'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=88 beats='the reliquary is a drowned vault of niches, the tide-scepter floating tethered in a bubble of trapped air behind a lattice of old wards; a rival marker buoy bobs at the ceiling'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=84 beats='the wards answer to the old court cadence; Sable can time the lattice gaps, force it with a pry-bar, or flood the air bubble to drop the scepter'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='Sable slides through a ward-gap between pulses and closes on the scepter tether'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the pry-bar snaps the lattice and the wards discharge, boiling the bubble away; the scepter sinks into a sealed niche and Sable is driven back'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='flooding the bubble drops the scepter into her hands but the inrush destabilizes the vault; take the scepter and run, or shore the ceiling first'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='shoring wastes the margin; the vault sloughs silt and pins Sable line, and she abandons the scepter to cut loose and retreat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='the tide-scepter is the second piece, its head crusted with pale coral; the way on drops toward the cistern vaults'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='two ways lead down from the reliquary: a spillway shaft running fast with current, and a slow silted stair'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='the spillway is quick but wild; Sable can brace and ride it or grab a rung and slow down'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the spillway spits Sable into a debris grille and holds her against the flow until she cuts her fin harness free and blows to the surface, two pieces still below'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the sump silt is bottomless and Sable sinks past her line length; she drops weights and rockets up, aborting the vault run'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the chisel cracks the wrong stone and a cold flood-tunnel opens; the current takes Sable tools and patience, and she withdraws'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=88 beats='the cistern vaults are a cathedral of black water, pillars marching into dark, the queen seal-ring set in a drowned font at the far end; rival bubbles trail up from somewhere near the font'>>

choices.label: Wade the deep sump for the shortcut.
Move pillar to pillar toward the font.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=86 beats='at the font the rival is already prying the seal-ring loose; Sable can confront, wait and shadow, or collapse the font arch to trap the ring in reach of only one of them'>>

choices.label: Confront the rival at the font.
The font silt hides a second, deeper drop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='the confrontation is all silt and slow blows in the cold; Sable can wrestle for the ring or knock loose the rival lamp and take it in the dark'>>

choices.label: Kill the lamp and take it in the dark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the wrestle wastes both their air; the rival breaks off with the ring and Sable, gauge in the red, must surface with only two pieces'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='shadowing pays off; the rival fumbles the ring into the silt and Sable sweeps it up before the cloud settles'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the arch comes down between them, sealing the rival out; the ring is Sable to take, but the collapse has stirred the whole vault'>>

choices.label: Search the rival dropped cache too.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the cache is a decoy; while Sable digs, the vault ceiling settles and floods the exit, and she barely surfaces with two pieces and a lesson'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=66 beats='the queen seal-ring is the third and last piece; all three regalia are Sable now, but the court is waking and the water is rising toward the observatory'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=76 beats='with the full regalia the way up runs through the drowned observatory; a flooded orrery hall and a collapsed dome gallery both lead there'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='the orrery hall wheels of drowned brass turn slow in the current, and the observatory hub opens beyond'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='a dome rib fails under Sable and a slab pins her against the gallery floor; she cuts free but the regalia bag tears and the ring is lost to the dark, and she surfaces with two'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=66 beats='the collapsed dome gallery is a maze of leaning slabs; a low crawl and a high ledge both angle toward the observatory'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='the observatory antechamber is a drowned clock of brass rings, the ascent shaft light a distant coin overhead'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='Sable threads the brass rings, the rival lamp swinging somewhere ahead in the murk'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='a drowned catwalk crosses the antechamber, groaning under the tide'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='past the observatory threshold the water thins to a cold breath of trapped air'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the shutter mechanism fights back and a counterweight drops across the only stair; Sable is sealed below the observatory and must ration back to the surface with the regalia but no way to seal the court'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the drowned observatory crowns the court, its shattered dome open to a shaft of surface light far above; here the old tide-mechanism could reseal the whole court, but the rival has beaten Sable to the control ring and the water is still rising'>>

choices.label: Move on the rival at the control ring.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=90 beats='the rival holds the observatory control ring, the last obstacle between Sable and a clean ascent with the full regalia; she can bargain, out-climb, or race the rising water to the ascent shaft'>>

choices.label: Out-climb the rival to the shaft.
Race the rising water straight up.
The rival feints toward the ascent shaft.
A wing of the dome peels loose above the control ring.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=78 beats='the rival will trade a clear ascent for one regalia piece; Sable can give up the circlet, give up the ring, or refuse and gamble'>>

choices.label: Refuse and gamble on the water.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the gamble fails; the water beats them both to the shaft and the rival, lighter, escapes first while Sable claws up last, empty-handed and outpaced to the surface'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=64 beats='Sable out-climbs the rival up the observatory ribs and reaches the control ring with the full regalia still slung'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=72 beats='racing the water, Sable reaches the shaft foot ahead of the rival but the tide-mechanism is behind her; seal now and lose seconds, or climb now and leave the court open'>>

choices.label: Turn back to seal the court.
Climb now, leave the court open.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=88 beats='at the control ring, with all three regalia, Sable can work the old tide-mechanism to reseal the drowned court behind her; she can seal fast and rough, seal slow and true, or skip the seal to guarantee her own ascent'>>

choices.label: Skip the seal, secure your ascent.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=74 beats='the fast seal catches but the mechanism groans, half-set; Sable can force it home and lose air, or accept the partial seal and climb'>>

choices.label: Accept the partial seal and climb.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Sable forces the mechanism home; the court groans shut, wards flaring one last time, and the ascent shaft is clear above'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=62 beats='the slow true seal takes patience Sable barely has, but the court locks clean behind her, regalia and wards accounted for, and the shaft waits'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=78 beats='the shaft climbs through cold decompression stops toward the far coin of surface light; Sable can hold the stops properly or push the ascent to beat the rival up'>>

choices.label: Push the ascent to beat the rival.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=70 beats='pushing the stops is a gamble against her own blood; Sable can ease off at the last stop or commit to the fast surface'>>

choices.label: Ease off at the last stop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=96 beats='Sable breaks the surface with the full regalia and the drowned court sealed clean behind her, the rival left below to surface empty; the recovery is complete and the court will keep its dead in peace'>>

ending.title: The Court Sealed, The Regalia Home

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=88 beats='Sable surfaces with the full regalia and a good seal, a stop skipped and a headache to show for it, but the court is closed and the three pieces are recovered'>>

ending.title: All Three, and the Court Closed

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=84 beats='Sable makes the surface fast and rough, regalia intact and court sealed, but the fast ascent costs her a hard week ashore; a win, paid for'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=64 beats='with the court only half-sealed Sable climbs the shaft, regalia whole but the wards still murmuring below, a job mostly done'>>
<<FILL role=resolution words=86 beats='Sable surfaces with all three regalia pieces but the court only half-sealed; the recovery stands, the sealing will need a second dive, a clever partial win'>>

ending.title: The Regalia Up, The Court Ajar

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=74 beats='leaving the court open, Sable makes for the shaft with the full regalia; she can take the rival trailing line up or climb her own'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the rival line is a trap, weighted to foul; Sable cuts free but loses the regalia bag in the tangle and surfaces with nothing but the story'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=84 beats='Sable surfaces with the full regalia, the court left open behind her for the tide to keep; the pieces are recovered, the sealing refused, a complete but colder victory'>>

ending.title: Regalia Recovered, Court Left to the Sea

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=62 beats='Sable hands the circlet to the rival and both climb the shaft under an uneasy truce, two pieces still hers'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=82 beats='Sable surfaces with the scepter and the seal-ring, the circlet gone to the rival; two of three regalia recovered and a rival owed a favor, a clever partial haul'>>

ending.title: Two of Three, a Truce Kept

nodes.body: <<FILL role=resolution words=62 beats='Sable gives up the seal-ring and takes the clear ascent, circlet and scepter secure against her chest'>>

<<FILL role=resolution words=82 beats='Sable surfaces with the circlet and the scepter, the seal-ring traded away; two regalia pieces home and the court still guarding its last, a measured partial win'>>

ending.title: The Ring Given, Two Brought Home

<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='Sable commits: the rival feints toward the ascent shaft, and the dark closes in'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the loose dome drives Sable off the control ring and she loses the seal window, forced up with the regalia but the court open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='Sable commits: a wing of the dome peels loose above the control ring, and the dark closes in'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=62 beats='the deeper drop swallows Sable line and she hauls out with nothing, the ring still below'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=58 beats='Sable commits: the font silt hides a second, deeper drop, and the dark closes in'>>
